reviewReply.comment:
Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that the food and coffee didn’t meet your expectations. This is not the experience we aim to deliver, and your comments regarding the chicken toasties and pastry have been noted for review.

For us to look into this properly, please DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in, and our team will connect with you directly.

reviews.comment:
Such a lovely café with a calm, inviting atmosphere and genuinely kind staff. The barista took the time to suggest a drink based on my taste, and it turned out to be one of the best cold brews I have had in a long time. This place is ideal for both working quietly and meeting friends.

Shahabaz was a perfect barista.
